case_title: FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC VS. JESSE CARLOS DIAZ et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-06-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $262.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, JESSE CARLOS

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, JESSE CARLOS
